Name: Eastman JRS Drive Utility Handy Vacuum Cleaner 40W Suction Long Battery Life USB Charging Mini Sofa Car Cleaning ECV528N
Description: 40W Powerful Suction: With a robust 40W motor, this cordless vacuum cleaner ensures powerful suction for thorough cleaning on various surfaces. Long Battery Life: Equipped with 2x2000mAh lithium batteries, enjoy extended cleaning sessions with a working time of 18-20 minutes, and a quick charging time of 3-4 hours. USB Charging: The convenience of USB charging makes it easy to power up your vacuum cleaner anytime, anywhere, ensuring you are always ready for quick cleanups. Lightweight and Portable: Weighing in at just 45 kpa, the ECV528N is lightweight and portable, allowing you to effortlessly navigate and clean every corner of your space. Versatile Cleaning Modes: Choose between different suction power modes to adapt to various cleaning needs, providing flexibility for different surfaces. Efficient Filtration: The vacuum cleaner features a high-efficiency filtration system, ensuring that dust and allergens are captured, leaving your space cleaner and healthier. Extra
